overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Mediterranean shipyard. The player character walks through a bustling harbor area with wooden scaffolding, stone pathways, and a large ship under construction. The scene features bright midday sunlight, clear skies, and NPCs in period clothing moving through the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side storage area with water wheel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone pathway beside a water canal, passing large wooden water wheels and stacked goods

entered.detail: large wooden water wheel with bucket mechanisms turning slowly beside the canal
tall stacks of purple and brown sacks piled along the path
narrow water canal with stone walls running parallel to the path
white canvas sacks stacked in pyramids near the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow stone pathway beside a water canal, passing a large wooden water wheel and stacks of purple sacks. The area is relatively quiet with few NPCs visible in the distance, and the bright midday sun casts sharp shadows across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with stone pillars

events.description: enters covered colonnade with wooden roof and stone pillars
exits covered walkway into open shipyard area with red banners

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered colonnade supported by tall stone pillars, then emerging into a more open area

notable_agents.action: NPC in yellow tunic walking in the opposite direction through the colonnade

entered.detail: tall white stone columns supporting the wooden roof structure
wooden beam roof structure providing partial shade over the walkway
tall red vertical banners hanging from wooden posts marking the shipyard entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered colonnade with tall stone pillars and wooden beams, transitioning from the canal area into a more open shipyard. Red banners become visible in the distance as the character emerges from the shaded walkway into the sunlit shipyard plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard plaza with market stalls and construction materials

events.description: slight turn to the right while navigating through the shipyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy shipyard plaza, navigating between NPCs and construction materials while heading toward the large ship hull

notable_agents.action: worker in blue tunic crouching near wooden materials on the right side

entered.detail: massive wooden ship under construction on scaffolding, dominating the background
wooden stalls with red awnings selling goods along the left side
large stone archway structure in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide-open shipyard plaza filled with wooden market stalls, red banners, and scattered NPCs. The massive hull of a ship under construction becomes visible in the distance, and the ground transitions from stone to dirt and gravel. Workers and pedestrians move through the area in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: active ship construction site with scaffolding and timber

events.description: slows slightly while approaching the large ship hull and navigating around construction debris

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the massive ship hull under construction, passing workers and navigating through the construction site with scaffolding and timber stacks

notable_agents.action: worker in green tunic bending over logs on the left side of the path

entered.detail: heavy timber scaffolding surrounding the ship hull with ropes and ladders
piles of cut timber and logs stacked for ship construction
tall wooden crane tower with pulley system for lifting materials

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside the massive wooden ship hull under active construction. Heavy timber scaffolding surrounds the vessel, with stacks of logs and construction materials lining the path. The camera moves through the narrow construction area, passing workers and wooden crane towers, with the ship's hull dominating the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet canal-side path into the bustling heart of a massive ancient shipyard. It begins along a narrow stone pathway beside a water canal, passing a large wooden water wheel and stacks of purple sacks under the sharp light of the midday sun. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions through a shaded colonnade of tall stone pillars and wooden beams before emerging into a wide-open shipyard plaza. The environment then expands into a lively hub of market stalls and red banners where the ground shifts from cobblestone to dirt and gravel. Finally, the camera pushes through a narrow construction zone filled with timber scaffolding and crane towers, moving alongside the towering wooden hull of a ship under active construction.
